name: master-ball
effect: Catches a wild Pokémon every time.
flavor_text: The best Poké Ball with the ultimate level of performance. With it, you will catch any wild Pokémon without fail.

name: ultra-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 2×.
flavor_text: An ultra-high-performance Poké Ball that provides a higher success rate for catching Pokémon than a Great Ball.

name: great-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 1.5×.
flavor_text: A good, high-performance Poké Ball that provides a higher success rate for catching Pokémon than a standard Poké Ball.

name: poke-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.
flavor_text: A device for catching wild Pokémon. It’s thrown like a ball at a Pokémon, comfortably encapsulating its target.

name: safari-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon in the Great Marsh or Safari Zone.  Success rate is 1.5×.
flavor_text: A special Poké Ball that was used in the Safari Zone in the Kanto region and in the Great Marsh in the Sinnoh region.

name: net-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3× for water and bug Pokémon.
flavor_text: A somewhat different Poké Ball that is more effective when attempting to catch Water- or Bug-type Pokémon.

name: dive-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon. Success rate is 3.5× when underwater, fishing, or surfing.
flavor_text: A somewhat different Poké Ball that works especially well when catching Pokémon that live underwater.

name: nest-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3.9× for level 1 Pokémon, and drops steadily to 1× at level 30.
flavor_text: A somewhat different Poké Ball that becomes more effective the lower the level of the wild Pokémon.

name: repeat-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3× for previously-caught Pokémon.
flavor_text: A somewhat different Poké Ball that works especially well on a Pokémon species that has been caught before.

name: timer-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon. Success rate increases by 0.1× (Gen V: 0.3×) every turn, to a max of 4×.
flavor_text: A somewhat different Poké Ball that becomes progressively more effective at catching Pokémon the more turns that are taken in battle.

name: luxury-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Caught Pokémon start with 200 happiness.
flavor_text: A particularly comfortable Poké Ball that makes a wild Pokémon quickly grow friendlier after being caught.

name: premier-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.
flavor_text: A somewhat rare Poké Ball that was made as a commemorative item used to celebrate an event of some sort.

name: dusk-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3.5× at night and in caves.
flavor_text: A somewhat different Poké Ball that makes it easier to catch wild Pokémon at night or in dark places such as caves.

name: heal-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Caught Pokémon are immediately healed.
flavor_text: A remedial Poké Ball that restores the HP of a Pokémon caught with it and eliminates any status conditions.

name: quick-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon. Success rate is 4× (Gen V: 5×), but only on the first turn.
flavor_text: A somewhat different Poké Ball that has a more successful catch rate if used at the start of a wild encounter.

name: lure-ball
effect: 3× effectiveness while fishing. Made from Blu Apricorn.
flavor_text: A Poké Ball that is good for catching Pokémon that you reel in with a rod while out fishing.

name: level-ball
effect: Success rate based off of fraction target Pokémon is of user’s Pokémon. Made from Red Apricorn.
flavor_text: A Poké Ball that makes it easier to catch Pokémon that are at a lower level than your own Pokémon.

name: moon-ball
effect: 4× effectiveness on familes of Pokémon with a Moon Stone evolution. Made from Ylw Apricorn.
flavor_text: A Poké Ball that will make it easier to catch Pokémon that can evolve using a Moon Stone.

name: heavy-ball
effect: Has flat bonus or penalty to catch rate depending on weight class of target. Made from Blk Apricorn.
flavor_text: A Poké Ball that is better than usual at catching very heavy Pokémon.

name: fast-ball
effect: 4× effectiveness on Pokémon with 100 or greater base speed. (Gen II: Roaming or Fleeing Pokémon). Made from Wht Apricorn.
flavor_text: A Poké Ball that makes it easier to catch Pokémon that are usually very quick to run away.

name: friend-ball
effect: Caught Pokémon start with 200 happiness. Made from Grn Apricorn.
flavor_text: A strange Poké Ball that will make the wild Pokémon caught with it more friendly toward you immediately.

name: love-ball
effect: 8× effectiveness on opposite sex, same species targets of the Active Pokémon. Made from Pnk Apricorn.
flavor_text: A Poké Ball that works best when catching a Pokémon that is of the opposite gender of your Pokémon.

name: sport-ball
effect: Tries to catch a Pokémon in the Bug-Catching contest in National Park. (Gen II: Park Ball)
flavor_text: A special Poké Ball that was used during the Bug-Catching Contest in the Johto region.

name: dream-ball
effect: Catches Pokémon found in the Dream World.
flavor_text: A somewhat different Poké Ball that makes it easier to catch wild Pokémon while they’re asleep.

name: beast-ball
effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 5× for Ultra Beasts and 0.1× for all other Pokémon.
flavor_text: A somewhat different Poké Ball that has a low success rate for catching a Pokémon.
